candidates.why: Explicit top-line revenue figure; matches definition of total revenue/sales and sits at top of income statement.
Represents a specific operating expense category, not total revenue; not appropriate for REVT.
Finance income, not operating revenue; should not be used as total revenue.
Interest income is a finance item, not operating revenue.
Represents comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income for the year
candidates.why: Represents total comprehensive income, not revenue.
Likely part of operating expenses/SG&A rather than direct cost of sales; there is a dedicated 'Cost of sale' line that is a better COGS match, even though it is not in the candidate list.
Component of personnel/operating expenses, not specifically labeled as cost of sales.
Duplicate-style personnel expense line, more SG&A-like than direct COGS.
Generic operating overhead, not specifically cost of sales.
Same category as other operating expenses; overhead.
Explicit SG&A, should be excluded from COGS.
Net operating result, not a pure cost of sales line.
Financing costs, not cost of goods sold.
Financing costs, not cost of goods sold.
Net finance result, not cost of sales.

variables.notes: REVIEWED. A dedicated line 'Cost of sale' clearly represents cost of goods sold / cost of sales and is the most appropriate mapping for COGS, but it was not included in the provided candidate list. Selected it from the full A-column preview instead of any of the more SG&A-like candidate rows. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Cost of sale

candidates.why: Personnel-related operating expenses; typical SG&A component but may be partially COGS in some firms.
Similar personnel cost line for other periods; SG&A-type expense.
Generic operating overhead; fits SG&A bucket.
Same category of other operating expenses; SG&A-type.
Explicit SG&A aggregation line with non-empty values; per hierarchy rule, when this exists and is populated, it alone should be used for XSGA_COMPONENTS.

variables.notes: There is an explicit, populated 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses' line. Per the SG&A hierarchy rule, only this aggregate SG&A line is selected for XSGA_COMPONENTS.
No research & development expense line (e.g., R&D, research, development) appears in the provided income statement preview, so XRD is treated as not separately reported.

candidates.why: Primary line for interest expense; matches XINT definition directly.
Interest component of lease liabilities; also an interest expense and valid backup if main interest expense line is missing in some years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental detail of lease interest; acceptable as an additional fallback for XINT.
Represents interest income (opposite sign of expense); not appropriate as primary XINT but could be relevant if only net interest were needed, which is not the case here.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Mapped XINT to the various interest expense lines in priority order. Interest income was excluded because XINT should capture expense, not net or income.

candidates.why: Represents total equity including any non-controlling interests if they existed; however, a more specific 'Shareholders' Equity - Total' line is present and preferred for BE to exclude any potential MIB.
Row appears but has no values in preview and is not clearly the aggregate shareholders’ equity; not suitable as primary BE measure.
Explicitly labeled shareholders' equity; best match for book equity attributable to owners/parent and numerically equals Total Equity here.
Balancing/technical row, not the main reported equity total.
Balancing/plug line, not the core equity amount.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Pure balancing item for the accounting identity; not suitable for BE.
Represents total assets/total equity and liabilities, not equity alone.

variables.notes: 'Shareholders' Equity - Total' is the clearest owner-equity line and equals 'Total Equity'; both are provided as priorities in case of label changes over time.
No line for minority interests or non-controlling interests appears in the balance sheet. Total equity equals shareholders' equity, indicating no separately reported MIB.
